title: A New Student in Class
description: This is a simple story about a classroom and the introduction of a new student, Yuki-san, adapted for Genki I Chapter 1 learners.

title: Hana and the Festival
description: A student introduces their Japanese friend, Hana. They have a simple conversation about a Japanese festival, including its name, time, and what can be found there, using only Genki I Chapter 1 grammar and vocabulary.

title: My Friends and I
description: A student introduces themselves and their friends, stating their names, nationalities, and majors. This story uses only Genki I Chapter 1 vocabulary and grammar patterns.

title: At the Bookstore
description: A high school student and their friend Ken are at a bookstore. They describe the location, different books, and a pen, using basic Japanese grammar for identification and questions.

title: Tanaka Hana, a Student
description: A new student, Tanaka Hana, joins the class. The story introduces her, her teacher Ms. Sato, and a classmate Ken, focusing on identity and possessions within Genki I Chapter 2 grammar and vocabulary constraints.

title: The Green Letter Mystery
description: A student arrives at school early and discovers a strange, green letter inside their desk. The anonymous note proposes a meeting after school, leaving the student surprised and curious about its mysterious origin.

title: Ken's Train Ride to School
titleJa: ケンさんの学校への電車
description: Ken takes the train to school every day. He reads a book on the train, experiences a dark tunnel, and arrives at a busy station where he observes people before walking to his classroom.

title: The White Cat
description: A student encounters a mysterious cat with unusual eyes near their school gate after classes. The cat disappears without a trace, leaving the student wondering if they will ever see it again.

title: Ken's Convenience Store Trip
description: Ken, a student, often goes to a convenience store near his school with his friend Hiroshi. They buy snacks and drinks, which is a fun way to relax after school.

title: Making Onigiri
description: A short story about making and eating onigiri, perfect for Japanese learners studying with Genki I up to Chapter 7. It covers preparing rice, adding fillings like tuna and fish, and enjoying the delicious finished onigiri.

title: Ramen Oishi
description: Ken loves ramen from a popular shop, but the line is always long. One day, he decides to wait, and discovers why it's so popular.

title: My Favorite Ramen Shop's New Opening
titleJa: 好きなラーメン屋の新しい店
description: A person's favorite ramen shop opens a new location. They go with a friend to enjoy the delicious ramen.

title: Kenji's First Bento
titleJa: けんじさんが作ったお弁当
description: Kenji decides to make his first bento for school. The story details his process of preparing ingredients, cooking, and carefully arranging his delicious meal.

title: Kenji's After-School Snack
titleJa: けんじさんの学校の後の食べ物
description: Kenji finishes school and feels hungry. He decides to go to the convenience store to buy a sweet snack and juice, which he enjoys outside.

title: The White Cat I See Every Morning
description: A student describes their daily walk to school and the special white cat they often see along the way, whose presence brings them joy.

title: Kenji's Favorite Bookstore
titleJa: ケンジさんと好きな本屋
description: Kenji loves his favorite bookstore. One Saturday, he decides to visit it, enjoy a coffee, and read a new book. This story describes his comforting experience.

title: My First Part-Time Job
titleJa: はじめてのアルバイト
description: A high school student gets their first part-time job at a small ramen shop. They learn about working, making mistakes, and the kindness of their boss.

title: Yumi's Bento Lunch
description: Yumi is a high school student who loves the delicious bento lunches her mother always prepares for her. She enjoys eating lunch with her friends at school, who often admire her homemade meals.

title: A Day at the Festival
description: A short story about a friend and I visiting a festival, enjoying food, games, and the atmosphere, from afternoon until night.

title: My Autumn Cafe
description: This story describes a person's favorite cafe in autumn, focusing on the atmosphere, new seasonal menu items, and the joy of experiencing the season through food and scenery.

title: Festival Fun
description: This story describes a fun evening at a festival with a friend, enjoying food, games, and the lively atmosphere.

title: A Fun Festival Day
description: A friend and I go to a lively festival, enjoy food, try games, and have a happy day out.

title: The Mystery Letter
description: A student finds a mysterious, unnamed letter in their locker one morning, leading to a secret meeting invitation by an old cherry tree after school.

title: My First Okonomiyaki
titleJa: 初めてのオコノミヤキ
description: This story recounts a person's first experience making okonomiyaki, from buying ingredients to enjoying the delicious meal they prepared. It highlights the steps of cooking and the joy of a successful culinary endeavor.

title: A Morning Walk with Coffee and Tea
titleJa: コーヒーとお茶の毎朝
description: This story is about a morning routine. Two friends walk to school, stopping at a convenience store for warm drinks before continuing their pleasant journey.

title: The Lost Omamori
description: Kenji loses his important good luck charm while walking home from school. Sakura, who is in the park, finds it and runs to return it to him.

title: My Host Family's Kyoto Garden
titleJa: ホストファミリーの京都の庭
description: This story describes a student's host family home in Kyoto, focusing on the small, beautiful garden outside their living room. It highlights the tranquil atmosphere and the host mother's care for the plants.

title: The Cat's Many Stories
description: Every day, a person meets an old man in the park who tells amazing stories about his cat. The cat seems to live many different lives, from being a smart thief to a brave hunter, but always remains a quiet, fluffy companion.

title: A New Ramen Shop
description: Sato, Ken, and Mika decide to visit a new, popular ramen shop after school. They enjoy delicious ramen and make plans to return soon.
